description: Style NoteA great shoe for casual days out, the Spider-Man shoe from marvel makes for a perfect addition to your little one's wardrobe. With a soft canvas upper, cushioned footbed and grippy outsole, you are assured that your little one has their feet firm on the ground.Product DetailsBlack printed canvas upper for flexibility and durabilityPU covering for toe-boxCentral lacing for a custom FitPadded footbed with fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and heel patchDurable PU outsole with diamond lugs and grooves for absolute grip and tractionMaterial and CareCanvas, PUWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
